description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named VCMI that triggers on push to features/*, beta, and master branches, on pull requests, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks if a successful build of the current commit exists, and if so, skips the build. Otherwise, it builds the project on multiple platforms with various configurations, including Linux, macOS, iOS, and Windows, using CMake and Conan for package management. The workflow also uploads build artifacts and sends notifications to Slack.
